summary: The APACHE II score has limited reliability in early-phase emergency surgical care due to its reliance on comprehensive hospital data collected after initial stabilization. Dynamic vitals such as elevated respiratory rates are better indicators of imminent physiological decline during critical moments when timely intervention can prevent adverse outcomes.

Answer choice: B
